text: In this subchapter, “pilot” means a branch or deputy pilot appointed under this chapter.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 4
### Chapter 62. Navigation Dist. Pilot Boards
##### § 62.061 — Definition

In this subchapter, “pilot” means a branch or deputy pilot appointed under this chapter.

*Acts 1995, 74th Leg., ch. 165, Sec. 1, eff. Sept. 1, 1995.*

subsections.text: In this subchapter, “pilot” means a branch or deputy pilot appointed under this chapter.

history.raw: Acts 1995, 74th Leg., ch. 165, Sec. 1, eff. Sept. 1, 1995.
